blockingIssues.description: The only code change in commit decfa02 is a new integration regression. The milestone explicitly requires runtime decode code to introduce or consolidate one canonical raw-row normalize/decode seam reused by save-return and foreign-aware reads, but diff inspection shows no production-file changes in core/src. This means the feature as delivered is test-only and does not establish the required runtime ownership.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen rust-library-worker guidance for milestone-scoped features whose descriptions explicitly forbid test-only diffs, so workers and reviewers treat runtime-code ownership requirements as mandatory acceptance criteria.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature description in mission features.json says this feature is not complete with test-only changes; transcript and handoff for worker session 21831580-47f2-42bd-92a4-3a0457efc569 state no runtime code change was needed, and git show --stat decfa02 shows only core/tests/integration_db.rs changed.
